shadcn-html / changelog

Changelog

All notable changes to shadcn-html, auto-generated on each release.

v0.7.5-alpha

April 12, 2026
  • feat(checkbox, input, label, textarea): enhance accessibility and improve component styles
  • docs(popover): enhance documentation and examples for popover component

v0.7.4-alpha

April 12, 2026
  • chore(docs): sync documentation with component updates and improve accessibility
  • feat(steps): add error state, size variants, clickable steps, and prefers-reduced-motion
  • Initial plan
  • feat(breadcrumb): enhance accessibility and styling for breadcrumb component
  • feat(pagination): enhance accessibility and structure for pagination component
  • feat(steps, tabs): enhance accessibility and styling for steps and tabs components
  • feat(navigation-menu): enhance dropdown functionality and accessibility
  • feat(button-group): enhance button group styling and documentation
  • feat(toggle): enhance accessibility and styling for high-contrast modes
  • feat(button): enhance accessibility and add new icon size
  • feat(typography): add RTL support and example in documentation
  • docs(icon): enhance documentation for Lucide icons
  • feat(separator): enhance accessibility and styling

v0.7.3-alpha

April 12, 2026
  • docs(typography): enhance documentation with new features and prose examples

v0.7.2-alpha

April 12, 2026
  • chore(docs): update documentation and add image and sidebar components
  • feat(carousel): enhance carousel functionality and accessibility

v0.7.1-alpha

April 12, 2026
  • feat(typography): enhance typography features and documentation

v0.7.0-alpha

April 12, 2026
  • feat(tooltip): enhance tooltip functionality and styling
  • feat(api): add new endpoint for user authentication
  • feat(documentation): update native web APIs documentation and enhance layout
  • feat(documentation): enhance layout and footer components
  • feat(documentation): add native web APIs documentation
  • docs(es-modules): enhance documentation on module usage and initialization
  • chore: enhance event listener initialization and documentation
  • docs(es-modules, installation, label, theming): update documentation for clarity and consistency
  • chore(docs): update semantic tokens references and replace deprecated file
  • docs(components): add documentation for various components

v0.6.0-alpha

April 11, 2026
  • chore(docs): update documentation meta tags and improve caching
  • feat(layout): enhance dark mode functionality

v0.5.0-alpha

April 11, 2026
  • chore: update .gitignore to include node_modules
  • chore(changes): update code changes structure
  • chore: update components for improved positioning and versioning
  • style(docs): update comment styles in documentation files
  • chore(docs): wrap headers in a sticky container and adjust padding
  • chore(docs): update script tags to use type="module" for better performance
  • chore(docs): update documentation and add new cascade layers page
  • feat(vite): add initial setup and core functionality
  • feat(docs): add scripts for embedding spec content and fixing component pills
  • revert: remove CSS bundling, restore individual component CSS links
  • feat(docs): bundle component CSS for documentation site
  • refactor: dogfood components in doc demos

v0.4.0-alpha

April 11, 2026
  • chore(changes): update code changes structure
  • chore: update components for improved positioning and versioning
  • style(docs): update comment styles in documentation files
  • chore(docs): wrap headers in a sticky container and adjust padding
  • chore(docs): update script tags to use type="module" for better performance
  • chore(docs): update documentation and add new cascade layers page
  • feat(vite): add initial setup and core functionality
  • feat(docs): add scripts for embedding spec content and fixing component pills
  • revert: remove CSS bundling, restore individual component CSS links
  • feat(docs): bundle component CSS for documentation site
  • refactor: dogfood components in doc demos

v0.3.0

April 11, 2026
  • feat(docs): generate documentation pages for new components
  • chore: update docs
  • docs: update documentation instructions and README

v0.2.1

April 11, 2026
  • chore(changes): clean up code changes section
  • feat(tailwindcss): add theme and utilities styles

v0.2.0

April 11, 2026
  • fix: use node instead of sed for changelog injection
  • feat(timeline, tree-view): add new documentation pages for timeline and tree view components
  • fix: push dev branch in deploy script
